prestazioni: For the **2.0L TDI (EA288, engine code: CUAA/CUNA/CUWA)** diesel variant, install a **Garrett GTB2260VK turbocharger** with a **custom BorgWarner 7640 billet compressor wheel** to achieve 320+ hp and 500+ Nm torque, paired with a **Dimsport Genius 2.0 ECU remap** (Stage 2) and a **Forge Motorsport intercooler upgrade** (FMIC-0001) to maintain intake temps below 50°C under full load.

Replace the stock **03L121111C** fuel injectors with **Bosch CRIN3 1050cc injectors** (PN: 0 445 110 360) and upgrade the fuel system with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump** (F90000267) and **Silicone Hoses Direct 6AN fuel lines** to support the increased flow demands of the turbo upgrade.

Swap the factory **02M 6-speed manual transmission** for a **ZF 8HP50 8-speed automatic** (from the Audi Q7 3.0 TDI) with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily disc** (SD-SB6000A) and a **Peloquin limited-slip differential** (PQ-001) to handle the torque and improve acceleration response.
estetica: Install a **Rieger Tuning T6 widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarters, and side skirts) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** and **Hella Rallye 4000 Compact LED spotlights** (mounted on a **Thule WingBar Edge roof rack** for off-road aesthetics).

Lower the suspension with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (T6-specific valving) and fit **BBS CH-R 9x20 ET35 forged wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35 R20)** for a flush, aggressive stance. Pair with **AP Racing 6-piston front calipers** (CP9660-350) and **356mm slotted rotors** for track-ready braking.

Replace the stock grille with a **VW Racing R-Line carbon fiber grille** and add a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (T6-specific, part #CF-VWT6-HOOD) with **custom LED daytime running lights** integrated into the lower bumper (using **Osram LEDriving LG fog light modules**).
